  1. Home
  2. rule
  3. Europe
  4. Norway

Norway

How to Distinguish

  • The domain is .no
  • Crosswalk signs 4 pieces
  • The license plate is White or green (green is for official/commercial vehicles)
  • The background of speed notation in Northern Europe is white If so, it's most likely Norway.
  • Northern Europe is dark red There are many log houses painted with
  • The dashed line on the side strip of the road is compared to Sweden.longNordic roadside
  • The characters “Ø・ø” are Denmark and used only in Norway
  • On the road name sign orange There are many backgrounds of (from 『[GeoGuessr] Complete explanation of country guessing by authorized players!- Daig_O』)

Signs you can find

Representative Companies

    SwedenNordic countries such as Norway and Dark red (Falun red) There is a log house painted with.

    The license plate is White or green (green is for official/commercial vehicles).Courier vans often have this color..There are also snow poles on the roadside.

    Are Norwegian commercial vehicles the ones with green license plates in Europe?Serbiaagricultural vehiclesonly.

    Noorwegen kenteken groen nieuw, CC BY-SA 3.0, wikipedia commons

    a crosswalk 4 Book.From the left Finland・Norway・Sweden.

    It is Scandinavian, and the background of warning signs like speed notation is white If so, it’s most likely Norway..From the left Norway・Sweden・Finland.You can see that the color of the sign changes at the border between Norway and Sweden..

    On the road name sign orange There are many backgrounds of (from 『[GeoGuessr] Complete explanation of country guessing by authorized players!- Daig_O』)

    Sweden

    Finland

    Norway

    The broken line on the side of the road long.From the left Norway・Sweden・Finland(References Digest: World Map Beginners Course + Question Corner | Citizen John).Here is an example of the Norwegian line.The border between Norway and Sweden also has a distinct line..

    The left is Norway, the right is Sweden.

    Posten Norge became a joint-stock company around 2002 as the Norwegian postal market became more deregulated.It seems to have been founded in 1647 (Source).

    Northern Europe is characterized by log houses painted in deep red (Falun red).(from Wikipedia 『farun red』).

    There are 7-Elevens in the three Scandinavian countries, but not in the rest of Europe.There is a corner for sandwiches and hot dogs.I remember that bread was sold frozen (I think).

    For some reason, the Norwegian government is a major shareholder of Keisei Electric Railway.(References Keisei Electric Railway > Stock status).The image is from March 2023.

    Narrow down state/region

    • The same vegetation is widely distributed north and south, making it difficult to narrow down the range.
      • ■ Zone where you can see the northernmost mountains and rock surfaces
      • ■ A zone where you can see the mountains and rock faces to the south
      • ■ The southernmost zone with many broad-leaved trees
      • ■■ A zone with a high proportion of coniferous trees and the roadside may be covered with short grass.
      • ■ A zone where there are fields and meadows, and there may be tall hedges and maple trees around the house.
    • The area code is 2～7.Starting from Oslo, the numbers increase clockwise.

      Panitz, Sina, et al. "Climate variability and long-term expansion of peatlands in Arctic Norway during the late Pliocene (ODP Site 642, Norwegian Sea)." Climate of the Past 12.4 (2016): 1043-1060., Attribution 3.0 Unported (CC BY 3.0)

      By Gyroscopbill212 - own work, CC BY-SA 4.0, Link

      Description of representative companies

      Company name code explanation settlement of accounts Dividend history
      Equinor NASDAQ It is a national energy company and has the largest sales and market capitalization in Norway.Operates oil and gas fields in the North Sea, including the Troll gas field, which is one of the largest oil fields in the North Sea.(References The Troll field and the Troll A, B and C platforms). Dividend History
      Golden Ocean Group NASDAQ A dry bulk shipping company independent from Frontline.It owns a number of large dry bulk vessels. Dividend History
